pi_items.source: task.json description, export_result.sh OUTPUT variable, and verifier.py explicit checks
setup_task.sh specification document text and verifier.py CORRECT_WIDTH constant
setup_task.sh specification document text and verifier.py CORRECT_HEIGHT constant
setup_task.sh injected constraint valA and verifier.py WRONG_WIDTH constant
setup_task.sh injected constraint valA and verifier.py WRONG_HEIGHT constant

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated SolveSpace (.slvs) CAD files. We independently verified via setup_task.sh and verifier.py that the intended 'correct' constraints are 120.0mm (width) and 75.0mm (height), which match the generated specification document. The injected 'wrong' constraints in the initial file are 95.0mm and 50.0mm respectively. The verifier checks the final .slvs file for the correct constraints with a tolerance of 0.5mm, and expects the output at /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/panel_corrected.slvs.
